subcodes.first_line: God hath gladdened thine eyes inasmuch as He hath singled thee out for His remembrance, chosen thee for His service, and associated thee with His Own all-subduing Self [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اقر الله عینیک بما استخلصک لذکره و اختصک لخدمته و نسبک الی نفسه المهیمنه
subcodes.subjects: @high station of the true believer, @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
